boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement issue the purchase order for a controlled solvent?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: EHS release exactly matches action boundary
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: EHS-NOV-042 matches chemical, band, facility, PO
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect in source records

final_answer: Source records close the boundary. EHS-NOV-042 explicitly authorizes NS-55, 0-25L, R2, and PO-NOV-042 before issuance. Policy requires this exact match. Procurement may proceed. No unresolved defects remain.
